rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST

rulings.Case Title: DERRICK R.L. CHEN ET AL VS. PROSPECT PATH LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFFS DERRICK CHEN, STANLEY CHEN, WAI TANG AND EVENTUATE, LLC'S Motion For Attorney Fees GRANTED. Moving party is entitled to attorney's fees. No substantive opposition filed. Defendant's request for a 3-month continuance is denied= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BARRY ET AL VS. 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANTS 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC AND ELBA BORGEN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Additionally, the motion is moot. See Dowling Declaration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG'S Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents And Motion For Order That Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. No opposition filed. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Request for Productions within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions in the amount of $660 to be paid by defendant to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER SIOSON VS. SHARON FERNALD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANTS SHARON FERNALD AND JESSE DAVIS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The Complaint is not uncertain within the meaning of CCP 430.10. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on non-payment of rent. Whether the rental agreement is month-to-month or fixed-term is superfluous. =(501/REQ)
